Services

Consulting Services

I help companies find and build the most effective ML solution for their problem — whether that's a rigorous statistical model, a large-scale recommender system, or a production LLM pipeline. 12+ years of experience means I know when to use each tool.

Who I work with

My consulting clients include e-commerce and consumer-tech companies that need large-scale recommender and ranking systems, pharma and biotech companies navigating AI in drug discovery, startups building LLM-powered products, content and SEO technology companies, and financial services firms exploring ML for underwriting and personalization. I've also consulted as an independent data scientist for academic research teams (published in Frontiers in Oncology).

What I offer

🤖

LLM & Agentic AI Systems

End-to-end design and build of production LLM systems: RAG pipelines, tool-use and multi-agent orchestration, LLM evaluation frameworks, and fine-tuning with LoRA / QLoRA / Axolotl / Unsloth / TRL.

RAG Agents Fine-tuning LoRA Evaluation OpenAI Gemini Llama
🔬

Biomedical & Pharma ML

ML strategy and hands-on R&D for regulated, complex data environments — drug discovery, clinical evidence synthesis, diagnostics, and biomarker identification. I know how LLMs fail in these domains and how to work around it.

Drug Discovery Biomarker Evidence Synthesis Regulated Data Pharma
📝

NLP / NLG Pipelines

Information extraction, question answering, search-intent classification, knowledge-base construction, and neural content generation. I built one of the very first production NLG content writers and know how to make them work at scale.

NLP NLG Transformers Intent Classification Knowledge Graphs SEO
👁️

Computer Vision & Signal Processing

Object detection, image classification, inventory automation, and BCI/EEG signal processing using OpenBCI and custom pipelines. From supermarket shelves to brain signals.

CV OpenCV OpenBCI EEG Object Detection CUDA
💳

FinTech ML

Alternative credit scoring for the unbanked using heterogeneous data sources, churn prediction, personalization engines, and ML-driven business decision systems for financial services.

Credit Scoring Churn Personalization Graph ML FinTech
📊

Traditional ML & Statistical Analysis

The full ML toolkit beyond LLMs — gradient boosting, ensemble methods, time-series forecasting, clustering, survival analysis, and rigorous statistical modelling. I find the best solution for your problem, not just the trendiest one.

XGBoost Scikit-learn Statistical Analysis Time-series Survival Analysis R
🛍️

Recommender Systems & E-commerce ML

Large-scale recommendation engines for e-commerce and consumer apps — collaborative filtering, two-tower models, ranking systems, and real-time personalization pipelines at scale.

Recommender Systems Ranking Personalization Two-Tower E-commerce Shopify

Engagement models

💬

Advisory Calls

A focused 60–90 min session to review your ML architecture, data science approach, or AI system design. Walk away with a concrete action plan.

🛠️

Fixed-Scope Projects

Defined deliverable, defined timeline. Ideal for building a new ML model, designing a recommender system, running a statistical analysis, or evaluating an existing AI system.

🏛️

GLG Research Expert Network

I am an invited member of the GLG (Gerson Lehrman Group) Research Expert Network — one of the world's leading expert networks used by investment firms, management consultancies, and Fortune 500 companies to access domain expertise.

Through GLG, I'm available for expert consultations on machine learning, LLMs, AI systems in regulated industries, and applied data science. If you're a GLG member, you can book me directly through the platform. For direct engagements, use the contact form.

Published consulting work

As Data Science Consultant for AOA Dx, I contributed to biomarker research that led to a peer-reviewed publication in Frontiers in Oncology:

GD2 and GD3 gangliosides as diagnostic biomarkers for all stages and subtypes of epithelial ovarian cancer →

Ready to start?

Drop me an email with a brief description of your problem and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.

Send a message
